aesthetic_character.finding: The result is a restrained editorial information deck; visual interest comes from rhythm, semantic contrast and purposeful object variation instead of decoration.

density_and_whitespace.finding: The 1120 by 630 frames preserve a 60-pixel safety margin and deliberate whitespace without reducing the board to decorative emptiness.

hierarchy.finding: Each frame has one dominant title, one thesis and one bounded main visual without a competing headline layer.

information_architecture.finding: Seven finite frames form cover, reading map, object choice, architecture, quality gate, before/after synthesis and evidence appendix.

object_selection.finding: Comparisons use tables, evidence uses a document and table, relationships use seven connectors, decisions and risks use shapes, and finished content uses zero sticky notes.

palette_and_consistency.finding: Five restrained semantic colour roles distinguish structure, evidence, decision and risk while text and shape remain redundant cues.

readability.finding: Frame-level preview text is readable and aligned; overview mode exposes the narrative sequence rather than attempting to show body copy.

method.excluded_capture: Unauthenticated Miro private-access page was excluded from visual evidence.
method.provider_binding: exact remote item-type and connector-count conformance

non_claims: permission to alter existing unrelated boards
